title: The Queen's Gambit
summary: Offer a pawn to control the center

steps.title: The Classical Queen's Pawn
steps.text: The Queen's Gambit begins 1.d4 d5 2.c4. White offers the c-pawn. If Black takes, the center is abandoned. If Black declines (most common at master level), White maintains strong central control.

steps.hint: 2.c4 — attack the d5 pawn with a flank pawn.

steps.title: Decline or Accept?
steps.text: If Black accepts (2...dxc4), White usually recovers the pawn quickly. If Black declines (2...e6, 2...c6, 2...Nf6), the game becomes a positional battle for central squares. Either way, White gets a strong initiative.
